RADHA MODI +91 9324892042 modiradha40@gmail.com Mumbai, India WORK EXPERIENCE Cyber Security Analyst Web Developer Intern Performed manual web and network vulnerability assessments on client systems, identifying multiple high/medium/low findings aligned with OWASP Top 10 . Id entified phishing attempts in client environments and shared awareness tips . Built an admin panel with React and Node.js, boosting backend efficiency and user management. Integrated AI-driven automation features , reducing manual effort and enhancing system functionality. Leverag ed Jira, Confluence, and Git to improve project tracking , collaboration , and delivery speed. DCyber Techlabs Engaze CERTIFICATIONS CJWPT (Certified Junior Web Penetesting Expert) - Hack and Fix Academy ACADEMIC QUALIFICATION BTECH in Computer Science and Engineering (IOT and Cyber Security with Block Chain Technology) SGPA - 9.52 Dwarkadas J. Sanghvi College of Engineering Diploma in Computer Engineering GPA - 9.24 Shri Bhagubhai Mafatlal Poytechnic and College of Engineering THM TOP 4% LinkedIn : Radha Modi PROJECTS TechPathway | AI- Driven Career Guidance Platform Built a career prediction system with Flask, React, Firebase, and ML libraries (Scikit-learn, Pandas) to guide students toward suitable job roles. Integrated a chatbot for career queries and automated resume generation, i mproving user support and accessibility . Added certificate tracking , quizzes, and job insights for a complete career guidance experience. Cyber Rakshak | AI-Powered Cyber Fraud Detection Platform Built an AI-driven platform to detect cyber frauds from suspicious links, QR codes, emails, and messages . Devel oped a browser extension for real-time website scanning and a cyber awareness chatbot to educate users about cybercrimes. Implemented automated cybercrime report generation and a community threat-intelligence system to help users report and track scams . University of Mumbai Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education TECHNICAL SKILLS Security: Vulnerability Assessment , Penetration Testing , OWASP Top 10, OSINT Security Tools: Burp Suite , Nmap, Wireshark , Metasploit, Kali Linux Programming & Scripting: Python, JavaScript, SQL, Bash Soft Skills: Problem-Solving, Team Collaboration, Adaptability, Time Management, Documentation May 2025 - July 2025 May 2024 - Jun 2024 May 2026 CISEH (Certified Information Security and Ethical Hacker) - Pristine Infosolutions Sep 2025 2025 - 2028 2022 - 2025 ACHIEVEMENTS 1 .
